metadata.description: Claude Code skills for WordPress design, SEO, marketing, and local business consulting. Three-tier agent architecture: haiku for data collection, sonnet for analysis, opus for strategy.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: Shared agent library. 12 agents across 3 tiers: Tier 1 (haiku) for data collection, Tier 2 (sonnet) for analysis, Tier 3 (opus) for strategic synthesis.

plugins.name: wordpress-design
plugins.description: WordPress theme design guidance across block themes (FSE), classic themes, and page builders. Includes ACF content modeling, performance optimization, and a 9-section site audit checklist.

plugins.name: wordpress-security
plugins.description: WordPress security audit covering core/plugin/theme updates, authentication hardening, file permissions, HTTP security headers, information disclosure, malware detection, and backup verification. 80+ checks with 0-100 health score.

plugins.name: market-seo-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent SEO diagnostic. Phase 1 collects technical data via market-site-analyzer. Phase 2 branches adaptively: local businesses trigger market-local-visibility-researcher, blogs trigger market-on-page-seo-scorer, competitors trigger market-seo-comparison. Synthesizes into a prioritized action plan.

plugins.name: local-business-site-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent audit for local service businesses. Three parallel agents (market-site-analyzer, market-local-visibility-researcher, market-competitor-profiler) feed market-strategic-synthesis for a client-ready report focused on lead generation.

plugins.name: market-seo-schema-markup
plugins.description: Add, fix, or optimize schema.org structured data in JSON-LD format. Covers Organization, Article, Product, FAQ, LocalBusiness, and more.

plugins.name: content-strategy
plugins.description: Multi-agent content strategy. Parallel research: market-competitor-profiler, market-serp-researcher, market-review-miner. Optional market-strategic-synthesis for positioning. Produces pillar architecture, cluster plans, AI citation strategy, and 90-day roadmap. Absorbs blog-strategy.

plugins.name: marketing-copywriting
plugins.description: Write, rewrite, or improve marketing copy for any page — homepage, landing pages, pricing pages, feature pages. Covers headlines, CTAs, value propositions, and page structure.

plugins.name: content-refine
plugins.description: All-in-one content editing. Runs ai-writing-detector and copy-quality-scorer in parallel, then removes AI patterns, tightens prose, fixes passive voice, and converts features to benefits. Before/after scores.

plugins.name: marketing-page-cro
plugins.description: Conversion rate optimization. Runs market-site-analyzer and copy-quality-scorer in parallel, then applies CRO judgment for value proposition clarity, CTA effectiveness, trust signals, friction audit, and page speed impact.

plugins.name: market-customer-research
plugins.description: Customer research in two modes: analyze existing assets (transcripts, surveys, tickets) OR gather fresh intel via market-review-miner and market-serp-researcher agents. Produces VOC themes, customer language patterns, and persona sketches.

plugins.name: marketing-email-sequence
plugins.description: Create or optimize email sequences, drip campaigns, welcome series, nurture flows, and lifecycle email programs.

plugins.name: marketing-lead-magnets
plugins.description: Plan and create lead magnets for email capture and lead generation. Covers checklists, templates, guides, quizzes, and gating strategy.

plugins.name: market-competitor-alternatives
plugins.description: Create competitor comparison and alternative pages for SEO and sales enablement. Covers vs pages, alternative pages, and competitive positioning.

plugins.name: market-competitor-research
plugins.description: Multi-agent competitive intelligence. Phase 1: market-site-analyzer + market-competitor-profiler + market-segment-classifier in parallel. Phase 2: market-seo-comparison. Phase 3: market-strategic-synthesis (opus). Produces threat assessment, gap analysis, and 90-day action plan.

plugins.name: marketing-launch-strategy
plugins.description: Plan product launches, feature announcements, and go-to-market strategies. Covers the 5-phase launch approach, Product Hunt, and post-launch marketing.

plugins.name: marketing-experimentation
plugins.description: Full A/B testing lifecycle. Hypothesis design with ICE scoring, tool selection, implementation patterns (PostHog, Optimizely, VWO, Nelio), QA validation via ab-test-validator agent, result analysis, and experimentation program management.

plugins.name: chatbot-creator
plugins.description: End-to-end chatbot creation. Five specialized agents cover architecture design (opus), implementation scaffolding, prompt quality review, security and guardrails audit, and conversation UX design. Supports WordPress widgets, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, and custom APIs.

plugins.name: wordpress-issue-debug
plugins.description: WordPress issue debugger. Diagnoses errors, broken layouts, white screen of death, 500/503 errors, plugin conflicts, PHP fatal errors, database errors, and redirect loops. Works with or without a live URL — an error message alone is enough to start.

plugins.name: skill-builder
plugins.description: Interactive agent builder. Walks through tier selection, naming conventions, and all required sections (identity, input, steps, output, error handling, rules). Creates the agent file and registers it in the manifest. Use when adding a new shared agent to the library.

plugins.name: blog
plugins.description: Full-lifecycle blog engine with 21 commands, 12 content templates, 5-category 100-point scoring, and 4 specialized agents. Routes to sub-skills for writing, rewriting, analysis, audits, strategy, and more.

plugins.name: blog-write
plugins.description: Write new blog articles from scratch optimized for Google rankings and AI citations. 7-phase workflow with template selection, research, SVG charts, quality checks, and answer-first formatting.

plugins.name: blog-rewrite
plugins.description: Rewrite and optimize existing blog posts for Google rankings and AI citations. 6-phase optimization with audit scoring, research, chart generation, AI detection removal, and verification.

plugins.name: blog-analyze
plugins.description: Audit and score blog posts on a 5-category 100-point scoring system with AI content detection. Covers Content Quality (30), SEO (25), E-E-A-T (15), Technical (15), AI Citation (15).

plugins.name: blog-audit
plugins.description: Full-site blog health assessment with parallel subagents for content quality, SEO, schema, link health, freshness detection, and AI citation readiness.

plugins.name: blog-brief
plugins.description: Generate detailed content briefs with keyword research, competitive SERP analysis, statistics sourcing, template recommendation, and multi-channel distribution planning.

plugins.name: blog-outline
plugins.description: SERP-informed outline generation with H2/H3 heading hierarchy, competitive content gap analysis, and visual element placement markers.

plugins.name: blog-strategy
plugins.description: Blog strategy development with topic cluster architecture, audience segmentation, competitive landscape analysis, AI citation surface strategy, and 90-day roadmap.

plugins.name: blog-calendar
plugins.description: Generate editorial calendars with topic clusters, content decay detection, freshness update scheduling, seasonal hooks, and cross-platform distribution planning.

plugins.name: blog-seo-check
plugins.description: Post-writing SEO validation with 11-point pass/fail checklist covering title tag, meta description, heading hierarchy, internal/external links, OG tags, schema, and URL structure.

plugins.name: blog-schema
plugins.description: Generate complete JSON-LD schema markup for blog posts using @graph pattern. BlogPosting, Person, Organization, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, ImageObject, VideoObject.

plugins.name: blog-chart
plugins.description: Generate dark-mode-compatible inline SVG data visualization charts. 7 types: horizontal bar, grouped bar, donut, line, lollipop, area, radar. Internal sub-skill for blog-write and blog-rewrite.

plugins.name: blog-image
plugins.description: AI image generation and editing for blog content powered by Gemini via nanobanana-mcp. Hero images, inline illustrations, social preview cards, and OG images with 6 domain modes.

plugins.name: blog-audio
plugins.description: Generate audio narration of blog posts using Google Gemini TTS. Summary, full article, and two-person podcast dialogue modes with 30 voice options.

plugins.name: blog-geo
plugins.description: AI citation optimization audit for ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Passage-level citability scoring with citation capsule generation and platform-specific recommendations.

plugins.name: blog-factcheck
plugins.description: Verify statistics and claims in blog posts by fetching cited source URLs. Confidence scoring per claim with fabrication detection and replacement source suggestions.

plugins.name: blog-cannibalization
plugins.description: Detect keyword cannibalization across blog posts with local file-based or DataForSEO API modes. Severity scoring with merge, differentiate, or canonical recommendations.

plugins.name: blog-repurpose
plugins.description: Repurpose blog posts for Twitter/X threads, LinkedIn articles, YouTube scripts, Reddit posts, and email newsletters with platform-specific formatting and tone adaptation.

plugins.name: blog-persona
plugins.description: Create and manage writing personas with NNGroup 4-dimension tone framework. Enforces brand voice during blog-write and blog-rewrite workflows.

plugins.name: blog-taxonomy
plugins.description: Extract, suggest, and sync tags and categories for blog posts. Supports WordPress REST, Shopify GraphQL, Ghost Admin, Strapi, and Sanity CMS platforms.

plugins.name: blog-notebooklm
plugins.description: Query Google NotebookLM notebooks for source-grounded, citation-backed research. Smart discovery, library management, and headless browser integration.

plugins.name: blog-google
plugins.description: Google API integration for blog performance. PageSpeed Insights, CrUX field data, Search Console queries, GA4 organic traffic, YouTube video search, NLP entity analysis, and Keyword Planner.
